zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Aton於大約1352年出生在英國越可爾時，她的母親Isabel Percy27歲，父親Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton55歲。她於大約1365年與Sir William Playce在英國達勒姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1419年5月8日在英國達勒姆享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Aton于大约1352年出生在英国越可爾时，她的母亲Isabel Percy27岁，父亲Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton55岁。她于大约1365年与Sir William Playce在英国達勒姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1419年5月8日在英国達勒姆享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Aton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Hatton , with loss of initial H-.
topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)).

variants.name: Hatton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Hatton (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Middlesex, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Warwickshire), Hatton Hall (Cheshire), or Cold and High Hatton (Shropshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Heath .
English: variant of Atton with prosthetic H-, a topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)). Compare Towne .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chatáin, a patronymic from a personal name meaning ‘servant of (Saint) Catan’; see McHatton .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Aton was born about 1352, in Yorkshire, England, her mother, Isabel Percy, was 27 and her father, Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton, was 55. She married Sir William Playce about 1365, in Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 8 May 1419, in Durham, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Aton est née environ 1352, à Everwyck, Angleterre, sa mère, Isabel Percy, avait 27 ans et son père, Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton, avait 55 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Playce environ 1365, à Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 8 mai 1419, à Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Aton um 1352 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihre Mutter Isabel Percy 27 und ihr Vater Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton 55. Sie hat um 1365 in Durham, England Sir William Playce geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 8. Mai 1419 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Durham, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Aton è nata il circa 1352 nel Yorkshire, England, sua madre, Isabel Percy, aveva 27 anni e sua padre, Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton, aveva 55 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Playce circa 1365, nel Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 8 maggio 1419, nel Durham, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Atonが約1352年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，母Isabel Percyは27歳，父Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Atonは55歳であった。約1365年にイギリスダルハムでSir William Playceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1419年5月8日にイギリスダルハムで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Aton(이)가 대략 1352년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Percy(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton(은)는 55세였다. 그녀는 대략 1365년 영국 뒤람에서 Sir William Playce(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 5월 8일 영국 뒤람에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Aton nasceu aproximadamente 1352, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, sua mãe, Isabel Percy, tinha 27 anos e seu pai, Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton, tinha 55 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Playce aproximadamente 1365, em Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 8 de maio de 1419, em Durham, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Aton родилась около 1352 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её матери по имени Isabel Percy было 27 лет, а отцу, которого звали Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton, 55. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Playce около 1365 г. в местности дурам, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 8 мая 1419 г. в местности дурам, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Aton nació aproximadamente 1352, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su mamá, Isabel Percy, tenía 27 años y su papá, Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton, tenía 55 años. Se casó con Sir William Playce aproximadamente 1365, en Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 8 de mayo de 1419, en Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
